title: CopilotKit/CopilotKit
summary: A frontend framework stack for building AI Agents and Generative UI, supporting React, Angular, Mobile, and Slack integrations. Creators of the AG-UI Protocol, an open standard for agent-generated user interfaces. 34.9k stars, TypeScript-based, gained 2,473 stars this week.
chinese_summary: 面向 AI Agent 和生成式 UI 的前端框架栈，支持 React、Angular、Mobile、Slack 等平台集成。AG-UI 协议（Agent-Generated UI）的创建者，定义了 Agent 生成用户界面的开放标准。3.49 万星，TypeScript 实现，本周新增 2473 星。
